---
title: "Projects"
---

## Selected Projects

Here are some of the key projects that highlight my ability to combine operational leadership with data analytics and process improvement.

### 1. Automated Budget & Resource Reporting Dashboard
**Role:** Lead Developer & Project Manager  
**Tools:** Python, Pandas, Excel + Power Query, Automated Scheduling

Built an automated reporting system that replaced manual Excel processes for tracking a $296M budget. The tool pulled data from multiple sources, cleaned and standardized it, then generated executive-ready reports.

- Reduced report generation time from **3–4 days to under 2 hours**
- Improved data accuracy by approximately **80%**
- Used by senior leadership for monthly resource allocation decisions

**Technologies:** Python, Pandas, NumPy, Jupyter, automated Python scripts

---

### 2. Cross-Functional Training & Deployment Optimization
**Role:** Mission Support & Logistics Exercise Planner  
**Tools:** Data analysis, scheduling optimization, stakeholder coordination

Led the planning and execution of large-scale joint training exercises involving multiple countries and military branches. Developed analytical tools to optimize resource allocation and scheduling.

- Coordinated resources for exercises involving **hundreds of personnel**
- Created dashboards to track readiness metrics and identify bottlenecks
- Improved deployment efficiency through better data visibility

**Technologies:** SQL, Excel advanced modeling, data visualization

---

### 3. Supply Chain Process Automation (In Progress)
**Role:** Graduate Analytics Student  
**Tools:** Python, SQL, Polars, Jupyter Notebooks

Current capstone-style project focused on applying modern data analytics to real-world logistics and supply chain challenges as part of the Applied Business Analytics program.

**Technologies:** Python, SQL, Pandas/Polars, Data Visualization

---

### Other Notable Work
- Resource integration and budget execution systems for U.S. Army Europe-Africa
- Real-time operational tracking tools used during NATO exercises
- Team performance and readiness analytics during multi-year overseas assignments

---

**Want to see the code or reports?**  
Many of my projects are available on [GitHub](https://github.com/Caelusbellum) or available upon request.
